programme.title: House
programme.desc: O Χάουζ και η Κάντι διερευνούν τις επιπτώσεις των συναισθημάτων τους καθώς η ιατρική ομάδα προσπαθεί να θεραπεύσει τον ασθενή γιατρό συνάδελφό τους και ανακαλύπτουν ότι η κατάστασή του είναι πιο σοβαρή και κρίσιμη από ότι αρχικά είχαν υποπτευθεί.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Μαγκαζίνο 2024-25
programme.desc: Μια σειρά εκπομπών αφιερωμένη στο UEFA Champions League με συνεντεύξεις παικτών και προπονητών, παρουσίαση προφίλ των ομάδων και αποκλειστικά πλάνα από την κορυφαία διοργάνωση.

programme.title: Ποδόσφαιρο: Παρί Σεν Ζερμέν - Μπάγερν Μονάχου
programme.desc: UEFA Champions League 2025-26. Ημιτελική Φάση, 1η Αγωνιστική. Περιγραφή: Σωτήρης Κωσταβάρας.

programme.desc: UEFA Champions League 2025-26. Ημιτελική Φάση, 2η Αγωνιστική. Περιγραφή: Κώστας Ψάρρας.

programme.desc: UEFA Futsal Champions League 2025-26. 2ος Ημιτελικός. Περιγραφή: Χρήστος Κυριαζής.

programme.desc: UEFA Champions League 2025-26. Ημιτελική Φάση, 1η Αγωνιστική. Περιγραφή: Στέφανος Αβραμίδης.

programme.desc: UEFA Champions League 2025-26. Ημιτελική Φάση, 2η Αγωνιστική. Περιγραφή: Γιώργος Θαναηλάκης.

programme.desc: UEFA Youth League 2025-26. Τελικός. Περιγραφή: Τόλης Χριστοφοράκης.

programme.desc: UEFA Europa League 2025-26. Τελικός. Φράιμπουργκ και Άστον Βίλα θα αναμετρηθούν στον τελικό του UEFA Europa League, με στόχο το τρόπαιο και μία θέση στο UCL της σεζόν 2026-27. Περιγραφή: Στέφανος Αβραμίδης.

programme.desc: Cyprus League by Stoiximan 2025-26. Πλέι Οφ, 10η Αγωνιστική. Περιγραφή: Γιώργος Μπιτσικώκος.

programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a bombing at a local restaurant leaves several injured or dead, including a congresswoman and someone close to Isobel, the team races to apprehend the suspect before another explosive goes off.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an employee of the U.S. Army is shot in an industrial park, the team works to track down the killer who reveals a larger plot at play; Tiffany continues to struggle with the guilt surrounding Hobbs' death.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team investigates a series of brutal assaults; OA hides information about his own mugging.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a wealthy accountant is gunned down for secretly testifying against a notorious drug lord, the team's investigation leads Tiffany to ask for help from a friend who was formerly with the NYPD and is related to the dangerous crime boss.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: As the team works to rescue a 5-year-old kidnapping victim, Scola suspects the boy's mother isn't being forthcoming about why her son was targeted; Nina struggles to open up to Scola about matters in their relationship.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie returns from medical leave and helps the team investigate two homicides: a law student and a young man with possible gang ties; an inadvertent revelation from Maggie causes OA to worry that she is rushing back into the job too quickly.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a deadly truck heist arms the killers with enough ammonium nitrate to construct a massive bomb, the team discovers a link to a terrorist group Maggie is working to infiltrate.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A teen shows up at FBI headquarters with a large bag of fentanyl, seeking the team's protection from the men who shot his father; Nina goes to Scola with a proposal he is hesitant to accept.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The abduction of a young woman leads the team back to a cold case from 18 years ago, which pushes Isobel to reconnect with her old partner Jake and take another shot at solving one of her first cases at the bureau.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team jumps into action when analyst Kelly Moran is taken hostage.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: Young Furiosa gets caught in the crossfire of two tyrannical warlords. As the tyrants fight for dominance, Furiosa soon finds herself in a nonstop battle to make her way home.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to the most dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people.

programme.title: Avengers: Endgame
programme.desc: The remaining Avengers -- Thor, Black Widow, Captain America and Bruce Banner -- must figure out a way to bring back their vanquished allies for an epic showdown with Thanos, the evil demigod who decimated the planet and the universe.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: A security expert must infiltrate a burning skyscraper, 225 stories above ground, when his family is trapped inside by criminals.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a retired FBI agent is tortured and killed while working a security job, Scola and Nina go undercover as a married couple deep in the diamond game as the team tries to find out who is responsible.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an FDIC security guard is killed while tending to a pregnant woman in distress, the team works to locate the woman and the killer who took her hostage; OA and Isobel worry about Maggie as she navigates taking care of Ella.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team is thrown into a highly political case after four members of the Taliban are shot and one is kidnapped in New York with no record of their entrance into the country; OA struggles to open up to Gemma about his past in Afghanistan.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a truck driver is murdered and the drug he was transporting goes missing, the team hunts for those behind the remaining batch that is already wreaking havoc on the streets of New York.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Special agents Maggie Bell and OA Zidan join the team to investigate the murders of 18 young women, and they get help from a survivor associated with the deceased.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: As the body count continues to rise, Maggie Bell and OA Zidan rush to track down an active sniper who has an elusive motive.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie and OA investigate the death of a safety inspector and its possible connection to a leak at a nuclear power plant.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a senator's daughter is kidnapped and held for ransom, the FBI must find the little girl before their time limit expires; they must dig into the senator's past for clues to who did this to his family.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie and OA hunt down a ruthless group of robbers who are posing as police officers to target armored trucks.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie and OA lead the search for an abducted former biological weapons chemist.
